Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
M A R K C O M P L E T E
In this quick training video, Dean is going to continue the evolution of creating your small group, workshop or mastermind by helping you pick a type
of event you want to tun! Will you be running a half day virtual mastermind? A 2 day in person workshop? Maybe a 1 day in person mastermind?
Whatever it is, this is where you can decide which one you want to try first!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Pick if you are going to do your event virtually or in person.
Pick if you are going to do a small group, a workshop or a mastermind.
Pick if you are going to do a half day, full day or two day event.
